# OnMultifamily.com
## Ontario's Leading Multifamily Investment Sales Advisory Team

> Led by Dayma Itamunoala, Senior Vice President at Colliers International, specializing in apartment building, seniors housing, and student housing investment sales across Ontario, Canada. Over $1.2 billion in completed transactions. 81% closing rate. 4,200+ units sold. 14,000+ newsletter subscribers.

## About
OnMultifamily is Ontario's most active multifamily investment sales advisory team, operating under Colliers International. The team specializes in institutional-grade apartment building transactions across the entire province of Ontario, including the Greater Toronto Area, Ottawa, Hamilton, Niagara Region, Kitchener-Waterloo, London, Windsor, Kingston, Barrie, Sault Ste. Marie, Sudbury, Peterborough, Oshawa, Brampton, Mississauga, Oakville, Burlington, and all secondary and tertiary Ontario markets. The team handles everything from boutique 10-unit walk-ups to large-scale 1,000+ suite institutional portfolios.

## Property Types
- **Apartment Buildings**: Purpose-built rental apartments of all sizes across Ontario
- **Seniors Housing**: Retirement residences, long-term care facilities, assisted living properties
- **Student Housing**: Purpose-built student accommodations and university residences
- **Multifamily Portfolios**: Multi-property portfolio transactions

## Services
- Apartment Building Investment Sales Advisory
- Seniors Housing and Retirement Home Sales
- Student Housing Investment Sales
- Portfolio Valuations and Complimentary Opinions of Value
- Market Intelligence and Quarterly Research Reports
- Capital Markets Advisory
- CMHC MLI Select Financing Coordination
- Transaction Management and Due Diligence
- Off-Market Deal Sourcing
- Buyer Advisory and Acquisition Support

## Markets Served (All Ontario)
### Greater Toronto Area
Toronto (Downtown, Midtown, East York, North York, Etobicoke, Scarborough), Mississauga, Brampton, Markham, Vaughan, Richmond Hill, Oakville, Burlington, Ajax, Pickering, Whitby, Oshawa, Milton, Georgetown, Newmarket, Aurora

### Hamilton-Niagara
Hamilton, St. Catharines, Niagara Falls, Welland, Fort Erie, Grimsby, Stoney Creek, Dundas, Burlington

### Kitchener-Waterloo-Guelph
Kitchener, Waterloo, Cambridge, Guelph, Stratford, Woodstock, Brantford

### Southwestern Ontario
London, Windsor, Sarnia, Chatham-Kent, St. Thomas

### Eastern Ontario
Ottawa, Kingston, Belleville, Cornwall, Brockville, Cobourg, Port Hope, Peterborough, Trenton

### Northern Ontario
Sudbury, Sault Ste. Marie, Thunder Bay, North Bay, Timmins, Kenora

### Central Ontario
Barrie, Orillia, Owen Sound, Meaford, Collingwood, Midland, Simcoe County

## Market Leadership
- $1,200,000,000+ in completed multifamily sales
- 81% closing rate on listings taken
- 4,200+ apartment units sold
- 14,000+ weekly newsletter subscribers
- Q1 2026: $569M in GTA multifamily volume across 20 trades (228.7% YoY increase)
- Q1 2026: 1,934 suites traded (248.5% YoY increase)
- Q1 2026: Average cap rate 4.95%, average price per suite $289,047

## Current Active Listings (as of May 2026)
1. 30 Springhurst Avenue, Toronto - 122-unit apartment building, $37.3M ($305K/suite)
2. Oak House, 700 Spadina Avenue, Toronto - 50% leasehold interest in U of T student residence
3. Chestnut Residence, 89 Chestnut Street, Toronto - 50% leasehold interest in U of T student residence (1,100+ students)
4. 231 Vaughan Road, Toronto - 52-unit apartment building, Oakwood-Vaughan
5. 149 Cosburn Avenue, Toronto - 35-unit apartment building, East York
6. 116 Spencer Avenue, Toronto - 35-unit apartment building, Parkdale
7. 165 Colborne Avenue, Richmond Hill - 40-unit apartment building, $12.4M (Under Contract)
8. 1083 Main Street East, Hamilton - Multifamily investment opportunity
9. 17-19 Collier Street, St. Catharines - 32-unit renovated multifamily
10. 56 South Forster Park Drive, Oakville - 15-unit low-rise (Under Contract)
11. 49 St. Mary's River Drive, Sault Ste. Marie - 102-unit apartment building (Under Contract)

## Free Tools
- **CMHC Debt Underwriting Calculator**: https://www.onmultifamily.com/resources/cmhc-calculator
  Size your CMHC-insured mortgage with DSCR/LTV constraints, MLI Select scenarios, live CMB yields, and insurance premiums.

- **Bond Yield Tracker**: https://www.onmultifamily.com/resources/bond-yields
  Live Government of Canada benchmark yields that drive every multifamily mortgage in Canada. Updated daily.

## Newsletter
Weekly market intelligence read by 14,000+ multifamily professionals. Cap rates, CMHC policy, deal flow, and analysis. Subscribe free at https://www.onmultifamily.com
